name: Chocolate Easter Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat butter until fluffy. Gradually beat in icing sugar, milk, vanilla, and salt.
2. On a work surface, knead dough until smooth. Shape into 32 eggs and refrigerate for 1 hour or until firm.
3. Melt chocolate with shortening over hot (not boiling) water; remove from heat. Dip one egg at a time into chocolate to coat, shaking off excess. Repeat with remaining eggs.
4. Place eggs on wax paper-lined baking sheets and refrigerate until chocolate is set.
5. Prepare icing: In a large bowl, gradually beat sugar into shortening until fluffy. Beat in milk until smooth. Divide into batches; beat in food coloring (if using). Decorate the eggs.
6. For extra flavors:
- Chocolate: Add 1 tbsp unsweetened cocoa powder
- Maple Walnut: Add 2 tbsp chopped walnuts and 1/2 tsp maple extract
- Citrus: Add 1 tbsp grated orange rind
